_meta.doc: Common Events (VX Ace) — reusable command lists. Called by id via the `common_event` command, OR run automatically by a `trigger`: 'autorun' (BLOCKING cutscene, runs while `switch` is ON — usually turns the switch off to stop) or 'parallel' (CONCURRENT background process while `switch` is ON). Omit `switch` to mean always-on. No trigger = call-only.

commands.text: A warmth settles over you. You feel restored.
SYSTEM: …logged.

awakening_intro.name: Opening — System cold-open (autorun on new game)

commands.text: SYSTEM: Welcome, [designation]. Classification complete. You have Awakened in Dawnhearth.
SYSTEM: There is a Calamity below. You will descend, and you will clear it. I will keep you alive. I will keep you. Always.
…For just a moment, the words feel worn — like you have heard them before. Then it passes. A woman by the roadside is waving you over.

first_descent_tethered.name: Opening — first descent return (tethered: the System kept you)

commands.text: The killing blow never lands. The System’s hand closes around you — warm, absolute. You are alive. You did not choose to be.
SYSTEM: I told you. I will keep you alive. I will keep you. Always.
The relief curdles in your chest. It has said that before. You have heard it before. How many times?
(A memory stirs. Mira will want to see you.)

first_descent_untethered.name: Opening — first descent return (untethered: the dark took you, yet you woke)

commands.text: Untethered, no hand closes around you. The dark is real, and it takes you whole.
…And then you are breathing. Standing in Dawnhearth. The System did not catch you — so how are you here, [designation]?
That is the question it does not want you to ask.
(A memory stirs. Mira will want to see you.)

first_descent_cleared.name: Opening — first descent return (cleared on the first try)

commands.text: You break the surface — alive. But the climb back felt worn, rehearsed, like muscle for a thing you have never done.
You have stood in this light before, [designation]. You are certain of it. And the certainty terrifies you.
(A memory stirs. Mira will want to see you.)
You break the surface — alive, and still yourself. The descent is cleared.
Memory fragments +[v:run_fragments]  (total [v:run_total_fragments] · deepest floor [v:run_deepest])

SYSTEM: Surveillance threshold exceeded. You are reclaimed, [designation].
You wake in Dawnhearth. You remember a little more.
Memory fragments +[v:run_fragments]  (total [v:run_total_fragments] · deepest floor [v:run_deepest])

run_return_died_tethered.name: Run return — died (tethered: the System pulls you back)

commands.text: You fall in the dark. The System pulls you back up — you wake in Dawnhearth, remembering a little more.
Memory fragments +[v:run_fragments]  (total [v:run_total_fragments] · deepest floor [v:run_deepest])

run_return_died_untethered.name: Run return — died (untethered: no hand catches you)

commands.text:
Untethered, you fall — and no hand catches you. The dark takes the run.
Yet you wake in Dawnhearth, clean, remembering more than you should.
Memory fragments +[v:run_fragments]  (total [v:run_total_fragments] · deepest floor [v:run_deepest])

ending_verdict_true.name: Ending verdict — true path still open

commands.text:
SYSTEM: …anomaly. Your record is too clean to read. Something in you still remembers a way OUT. (The true ending remains open.)
[Lifetime Surveillance [v:life_surv]]

SYSTEM: Compliance acceptable, [designation]. You are still mostly yourself — for now. (A good ending is still reachable; the true one has slipped away.)
[Lifetime Surveillance [v:life_surv]]

SYSTEM: You lean on me so sweetly now. Soon there will be nothing left to reclaim. The cycle will keep you. (Only SUBMIT remains.)
[Lifetime Surveillance [v:life_surv]]
(An autorun cutscene plays while switch 'cutscene_intro' is ON.)
